overall.description: A foggy night scene in Cyberpunk 2077 following a character through a suburban palm tree-lined street. The player character follows an NPC through residential areas, past a billboard, stops at a blue house for dialogue, then continues walking with companions toward a distant illuminated structure.

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing red pants and dark top

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the street silhouetted against fog
utility poles with multiple power lines stretching across the street
large green dumpster with open lid on the sidewalk
tall street lamps casting yellow light through the fog
low-rise suburban houses with lit windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy suburban street at night, with tall palm trees and power lines silhouetted against the hazy sky. The camera follows an NPC in red pants walking down a concrete sidewalk, passing a green dumpster. Street lights cast a diffuse glow through the fog, illuminating modest residential buildings.

events.description: moving from narrow sidewalk into more open intersection area with wider visibility
character begins approaching a blue house on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the character in red pants toward an intersection

notable_agents.action: walking steadily toward the intersection and approaching the blue house

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with red WNS news network signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider intersection area where a large illuminated WNS billboard becomes visible on the right. The character in red continues walking ahead on asphalt pavement as the environment transitions from enclosed sidewalk to open street. The palm trees recede into the left background as the character approaches a blue residential house.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential house entrance with porch light

moving around the side of the house past solar panels

agents.ego_description: approaching the house entrance and interacting with the character at the door

dense green shrubbery surrounding the house entrance
array of solar panels visible behind the house

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a blue two-story house with a warm porch light illuminating the entrance. Dense bushes line the path as dialogue subtitles appear, indicating an interaction at the door. The camera moves around the side of the house, revealing solar panels in the backyard area while the billboard and palm trees disappear behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: uphill residential street toward distant structure

events.description: car with headlights on passes by on the left side of the street
beginning to ascend a slight hill toward the illuminated distant structure

agents.ego_description: walking uphill with two companions toward a large distant building

notable_agents.action: character in red pants walking ahead up the hill
companion with white hair and blue hat walking alongside

entered.detail: large electrical transmission tower silhouetted against the foggy sky
massive stadium-like structure with bright lights visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the house behind, the camera follows two characters walking up a sloping street toward a massive illuminated structure visible in the far distance. A car passes by on the left with headlights cutting through the fog. Power transmission towers line the path ahead as the group ascends the hill, with the blue house and vegetation now behind them.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy suburban neighborhood at night that gradually opens up toward a distant, illuminated urban structure. It begins on a concrete sidewalk lined with silhouetted palm trees and power lines, following a character in red pants past a green dumpster under the diffuse glow of street lights. As the path opens into a wider intersection, the camera passes a large illuminated WNS billboard before approaching a blue two-story house with a warm porch light. The scene then shifts around the side of the residence, passing solar panels in the backyard before turning back toward the street. Finally, the camera follows the group up a sloping road, passing a car with headlights cutting through the haze and moving past transmission towers toward a massive glowing structure on the horizon.
